zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_1: $self$没有躲开，反而自然地把手覆在了$target$的手背上，指尖轻轻摩挲着。"嗯？怎么突然这么粘人？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_2: $self$侧过身子，让大腿的接触面更贴合$target$的手掌，嘴角带着笑意。"要在这种地方开始吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_3: $self$只是依然看着手机，但身体明显放松了下来，默许了$target$的动作。"别闹得太过了哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_4: $self$把头靠在$target$肩膀上，腿轻轻蹭了蹭$target$的手心。"好暖和……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_5: $self$发出一声轻笑，并未阻止那只游走的手。"真是的，手脚真不老实。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_6: $self$全身猛地一颤，惊讶地睁大了眼睛看着$target$，却一时忘记了推开。"呃？！那个……$target$先生？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_7: $self$手中的动作停住了，脸颊瞬间涨得通红，不知所措地僵在原地。"这是……什么意思？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_8: $self$并没有大喊大叫，只是困惑地低头看着那只手，似乎在确认这是否是错觉。"……如果不拿开的话……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_9: $self$紧张地抓紧了自己的裙摆，呼吸变得小心翼翼。"请问……是有什么事吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_10: $self$紧紧咬着嘴唇，脸色苍白，身体控制不住地细微颤抖。"我……我知道了……请不要伤害我……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_11: $self$不敢看$target$的眼睛，只是死死盯着地面，眼泪在眼眶里打转。"只要我不反抗……就会结束的，对吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_12: $self$像一只受惊的小动物一样缩起肩膀，却不敢挪动分毫。"对不起……对不起……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_Begin_13: $self$闭上了眼睛，绝望地放弃了所有抵抗动作。"……求你，快点结束……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_1: $self$发出轻微的鼾声，翻了个身，无意识地把腿搭在了$target$的手上。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_2: $self$似乎感觉到了什么，迷迷糊糊地哼了一声，像赶蚊子一样挥了挥手。"唔……别闹……困……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_3: $self$在睡梦中皱了皱眉，缩了一下腿，但很快又沉沉睡去。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_4: $self$的呼吸依旧平稳绵长，完全不知道自己的身体正在被侵犯。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_5: $self$吧唧了一下嘴，梦呓着不知名的话语，对大腿上的异样毫无察觉。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_6: $self$依然保持着原本的姿势，完全凝固在时间里，对大腿上传来的触感毫无知觉。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_7: $self$大腿的软肉在$target$手指的按压下凹陷下去，但她本人依然维持着上一秒的笑容，仿佛一尊精美的人偶。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_8: $self$静止不动，只有那里的布料随着$target$的动作产生了褶皱，本人没有任何反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_9: $self$依然看着远方，毫无焦距，任由$target$的手指划过她敏感的大腿内侧。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_10: $self$像是一张静止的照片，只有被触碰的肌肤呈现出真实的弹性反馈。
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_11: $self$笑着拍掉了$target$的手，身体往旁边挪了挪。"哎呀好痒！别闹！"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_12: $self$按住了$target$的手腕，嗔怪地瞪了一眼。"正经一点，现在不合适。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_13: $self$抓起$target$的手放回原处，无奈地叹了气。"说了不行就是不行啦，别撒娇。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_14: $self$缩回了腿，用一种警告但并不严厉的语气说道："再乱摸我就要生气了哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_15: $self$并没有生气，只是坚定地摇了摇头，把裙摆往下拉了拉。"不可以，至少现在不可以。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_16: $self$礼貌而坚定地拿开了$target$的手，保持着职业的微笑。"抱歉，$target$先生，这样有些越界了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_17: $self$往后退了一步，拉开了安全距离。"我想您可能是误会了什么。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_18: $self$轻轻挡住了$target$的手，语气温和但疏离。"不好意思，我不习惯这种玩笑。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_19: $self$不动声色地调整了坐姿，避开了接触。"我们需要专注于工作，不是吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_20: $self$猛地站起来，厌恶地拍打着刚才被碰过的地方。"别用你的脏手碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_21: $self$眼神冰冷地盯着$target$，声音里充满了警告。"再动一下试试？我会让你后悔的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_22: $self$一把甩开$target$的手，毫不掩饰脸上的恶心表情。"你想被起诉性骚扰吗？滚开！"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_23: $self$冷笑了一声，用看垃圾一样的眼神看着$target$。"你以为你是谁？真让人作呕。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_24: $self$的呼吸变得有些急促，她不再说话，而是紧紧抓住了$target$的衣角。"嗯……好像……有点感觉了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_25: $self$主动张开了腿，眼神变得迷离起来。"既然都这样了……不想更进一步吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_26: $self$把脸埋进$target$的颈窝，发出一声满足的喟叹。"手……不要停……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_27: $self$的皮肤开始微微发烫，她难耐地在椅子上扭动了一下腰肢。"坏蛋……被你弄得奇怪起来了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_28: $self$原本僵硬的抵抗逐渐软化，脸上的红晕蔓延到了耳根。"……奇怪……为什么我不讨厌……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_29: $self$抬起湿润的眸子看了$target$一眼，声音细若蚊蝇。"如果……如果是$target$的话……也许……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_30: $self$的手指无意识地抓住了$target$的手背，不再是推开，而是挽留。"这种感觉……还是第一次……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_31: $self$有些羞耻地并拢了双腿，夹住了那只手。"……不要停下来……"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_32: $self$原本的笑意消失了，她一把推开$target$的手，语气变得生硬。"我说了我不舒服，你没听见吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_33: $self$烦躁地站起身，整理了一下衣服。"够了，这种玩笑开得太久了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_34: $self$虽然没有反抗，但身体僵硬得像块石头，眼神里透着失望。"你就只想着这种事吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_35: $self$默默地把脸转到一边，不再理会$target$。"……随便你吧，如果你觉得这样有意思的话。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_36: $self$终于忍无可忍，眼泪夺眶而出，声音嘶哑。"你在这个世界上只剩下这种下流的乐趣了吗？！"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_37: $self$的眼神彻底死寂下去，如同看着一团死肉。"你摸够了吗？摸够了就滚。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_38: $self$虽然还在被触摸，但整个人散发出一种令人窒息的冰冷气息。"我会记住今天的……每一秒。"
zh-cn.com_touch_thigh_39: $self$不再颤抖，取而代之的是极度的愤怒和屈辱。"把你的手拿开！立刻！马上！"

en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_1: $self$ didn't dodge, instead naturally covering $target$'s hand with her own, fingertips gently rubbing. "Hmm? Why so clingy all of a sudden?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_2: $self$ turned sideways, pressing her thigh closer to $target$'s palm, a smile playing on her lips. "You want to start right here?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_3: $self$ kept looking at her phone, but her body noticeably relaxed, silently allowing $target$'s action. "Don't go too far, okay?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_4: $self$ leaned her head on $target$'s shoulder, her leg gently rubbing against $target$'s palm. "So warm..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_5: $self$ let out a soft chuckle, not stopping the wandering hand. "Really, you can't keep your hands to yourself."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_6: $self$ shuddered, eyes widening in surprise at $target$, but momentarily forgot to push away. "Uh?! Um... Mr. $target$?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_7: $self$ froze, cheeks flushing red instantly, standing stiffly in confusion. "What... does this mean?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_8: $self$ didn't scream, but looked down at the hand in confusion, seemingly confirming if it was an illusion. "...If you don't take it away..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_9: $self$ nervously clutched the hem of her skirt, breathing cautiously. "Excuse me... is something the matter?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_10: $self$ bit her lip tightly, face pale, body trembling uncontrollably. "I... I understand... please don't hurt me..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_11: $self$ didn't dare look $target$ in the eye, staring at the ground with tears welling up. "As long as I don't resist... it'll be over soon, right?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_12: $self$ shrank her shoulders like a frightened small animal, afraid to move an inch. "I'm sorry... I'm sorry..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_Begin_13: $self$ closed her eyes, despairingly giving up all resistance. "...Please, just finish it quickly..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_1: $self$ let out a soft snore, turning over and unconsciously draping her leg over $target$'s hand.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_2: $self$ seemed to feel something, mumbling groggily and waving her hand as if swatting a mosquito. "Mmm... stop it... sleepy..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_3: $self$ frowned in her sleep, shrinking her leg back slightly, but soon fell back into a deep slumber.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_4: $self$'s breathing remained steady and long, completely unaware that her body was being violated.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_5: $self$ smacked her lips, murmuring unknown words in her sleep, oblivious to the strangeness on her thigh.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_6: $self$ remained in her original pose, completely frozen in time, oblivious to the touch on her thigh.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_7: The soft flesh of $self$'s thigh sank under $target$'s finger pressure, but she maintained her smile from a second ago, like an exquisite doll.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_8: $self$ stood motionless; only the fabric there wrinkled with $target$'s movement, while she showed no reaction.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_9: $self$ continued to look into the distance, unfocused, allowing $target$'s fingers to glide over her sensitive inner thigh.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_10: $self$ was like a still photograph, only the touched skin showing realistic elastic feedback.
en-us.com_touch_thigh_11: $self$ laughed and slapped $target$'s hand away, shifting her body aside. "Hey, that tickles! Stop it!"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_12: $self$ held down $target$'s wrist, giving a reproachful glare. "Be serious, now is not the time."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_13: $self$ picked up $target$'s hand and put it back, sighing helplessly. "I said no means no, don't be spoiled."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_14: $self$ pulled her leg back, speaking in a warning but not harsh tone: "I'll get angry if you touch me indiscriminately again."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_15: $self$ wasn't angry, but shook her head firmly, pulling her skirt down. "No, at least not now."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_16: $self$ politely but firmly removed $target$'s hand, maintaining a professional smile. "Apologies, Mr. $target$, that's crossing the line."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_17: $self$ took a step back, creating a safe distance. "I think you might have misunderstood something."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_18: $self$ gently blocked $target$'s hand, her tone gentle but distant. "Excuse me, I'm not used to this kind of joke."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_19: $self$ adjusted her sitting posture calmly, avoiding contact. "We need to focus on work, don't we?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_20: $self$ stood up abruptly, slapping the spot that was just touched in disgust. "Don't touch me with your dirty hands!"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_21: $self$ stared at $target$ with cold eyes, voice full of warning. "Try moving again? I'll make you regret it."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_22: $self$ threw off $target$'s hand, not hiding the disgust on her face. "Do you want to be sued for sexual harassment? Get lost!"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_23: $self$ sneered, looking at $target$ like trash. "Who do you think you are? Truly disgusting."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_24: $self$'s breathing quickened; she stopped talking and tightly gripped the hem of $target$'s clothes. "Mmm... I think... I'm feeling something..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_25: $self$ actively opened her legs, eyes becoming hazy. "Since it's come to this... don't you want to go further?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_26: $self$ buried her face in the crook of $target$'s neck, letting out a satisfied sigh. "Hand... don't stop..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_27: $self$'s skin began to heat up slightly, and she squirmed her waist on the chair. "You bad thing... you're making me feel weird."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_28: $self$'s stiff resistance gradually softened, a blush spreading to her ears. "...Strange... why don't I hate it..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_29: $self$ looked up at $target$ with moist eyes, voice faint. "If... if it's you, $target$... maybe..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_30: $self$'s fingers unconsciously grasped the back of $target$'s hand, no longer pushing away, but keeping it there. "This feeling... is a first..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_31: $self$ closed her legs together in some shame, sandwiching the hand. "...Don't stop..."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_32: $self$'s smile vanished; she pushed $target$'s hand away, tone becoming stiff. "I said I'm not feeling well, didn't you hear me?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_33: $self$ stood up irritably, straightening her clothes. "Enough, this joke has gone on too long."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_34: $self$ didn't resist, but her body was as stiff as a rock, eyes revealing disappointment. "Is this all you think about?"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_35: $self$ silently turned her face away, ignoring $target$. "...Whatever, if you find this amusing."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_36: $self$ finally couldn't bear it anymore, tears bursting forth, voice hoarse. "Is this obscene pleasure all you have left in this world?!"
en-us.com_touch_thigh_37: $self$'s eyes went completely dead, as if looking at dead meat. "Have you touched enough? If so, get lost."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_38: $self$ was still being touched, but emitted a suffocatingly cold aura. "I will remember today... every second of it."
en-us.com_touch_thigh_39: $self$ stopped trembling, replaced by extreme anger and humiliation. "Take your hand away! Immediately! Now!"
